g.text: • Central finite difference: perturb ±ε, evaluate forward model
SVD(Jw) = UΣVT → σmin = smallest singular value
• Jw noise-normalized → σmin directly interpretable as SNR
• σmin<1: unobservable | σmin>1: detectable | σmin≈1: threshold
○ Linear: allows "compensation" — hides failures in easy cases
○ Min: wastes effort on physically impossible "dead zones"
• Identify worst-case load via moment estimator: M = F1·s1 + F2·s2
• Run forward model → internal wrenches → Von Mises stress per link
• Factor of Safety: FOS = σyield / σvonMises (must be ≥ 1 for all links)
• Transverse Forces: Applied perpendicular to local axis
• Concentric Forces: Pass through geometric center
• Follower Forces: Defined relative to local frame
• Elastic Deformation: Purely elastic with full recovery
• Computes proximal wrench W = [Tx, Ty, Tz, Fx, Fy, Fz]
required for quasi-static equilibrium under load and tensions
Return: W = [Tx, Ty, Tz, Fx, Fy, Fz]
